summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ideas chart with REAL pattern renderer integration. Major success: V1 Rectangle (gray horizontal lines) and V2 Triangle (amber converging lines) patterns are rendering correctly using the same renderPattern function as TA/Research. Mock data with real boundaries working. One critical issue found: anchor points not displaying due to setMarkers API compatibility issue.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Chart functionality works with mock data, WebSocket not required for pattern rendering

integration_issues.issue: TypeError: candleSeries.setMarkers is not a function
integration_issues.impact: Anchor points (orange markers) not visible on candles
integration_issues.details: The setMarkers method is not available on the candleSeries object, preventing anchor points from showing where price touches pattern lines

passed_tests: Ideas View loads with real patterns
V1 Rectangle pattern visible (gray horizontal lines)
V2 Triangle pattern visible (amber converging lines)
Lines built from actual boundaries (not fake geometry)
Mock data with real boundaries loading correctly
Idea selector strip with filtering works
Pattern boundaries render using drawBoundaries function
V1 pattern shows as gray horizontal lines
V2 pattern shows as amber converging lines
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix anchor points rendering issue: The drawAnchorPoints function in patternRenderer.js is failing with 'TypeError: candleSeries.setMarkers is not a function'. This prevents orange markers from showing where candles touch pattern lines. Need to investigate TradingView Lightweight Charts API compatibility for setMarkers method.
